headlines.text: Trump says US-Iran peace deal set to be signed today, Strait of Hormuz to reopen
SpaceX IPO closes at $161, becomes largest public offering in history, makes Musk first trillionaire
UFC Freedom 250 kicks off tonight on White House South Lawn — Topuria vs. Gaethje for lightweight title
Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center facade overnight after court-ordered deadline
Israel strikes Beirut amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire negotiations; Netanyahu convenes security cabinet
FIFA World Cup 2026: Germany, Netherlands, Ivory Coast all in action today across the US
Olivia Rodrigo's third album 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' drops Friday, breaks Spotify records
Trump claims US strike killed Tren de Aragua leader in Venezuela
Oil falls below $85 on hopes of US-Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz
Today is Flag Day and Trump's 80th birthday — White House confirms it is not a coincidence that UFC is tonight

breaking.text: Trump says US-Iran MOU signing expected today; Qatari negotiators flew to Tehran this morning to finalize deal

stories.hed: US and Iran inch toward MOU signing as Qatari negotiators land in Tehran
stories.dek: Trump said the deal is 'scheduled to get signed' today and the Strait of Hormuz will open 'immediately' after — Iran said hold on, we have notes. Israel, apparently not invited to the peace party, struck Beirut anyway, which Trump called 'should not have happened,' a rare moment of presidential understatement.

stories.hed: FIFA World Cup 2026 Day 4: Germany, Netherlands hit the pitch as US hosts the world
stories.dek: Germany faces Curacao in Houston, the Netherlands take on Japan in Dallas, and the Ivory Coast open their Group E campaign — all while World Cup security concerns dominate Fox News Sunday chatter. At least someone's scoring goals.

stories.hed: Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center building overnight after federal court order
stories.dek: Workers dismantled the letters in the dark hours of Saturday morning, six months after they went up, as crowds gathered to watch and cheer. A federal judge had ordered the restoration of the Kennedy Center's original name by June 12; the administration appealed, lost, and now the scaffolding is gone along with the branding.

stories.hed: UFC holds first-ever White House fight night as Trump turns 80 on Flag Day
stories.dek: UFC Freedom 250 takes place tonight on the South Lawn, commemorating the US Semiquincentennial — coincidentally also the president's 80th birthday, which UFC promoters insist is a coincidence. Ilia Topuria defends his lightweight title against Justin Gaethje in front of 4,000 ticketed guests and 85,000 more at the Ellipse watching for free.

stories.hed: SpaceX IPO made Musk a trillionaire — and the company has lost $41 billion since it was founded
stories.dek: SpaceX raised $75 billion in the largest IPO ever on Friday, closed up 19% at $161, and minted Elon Musk as the world's first trillionaire — a man whose company's own prospectus admits it has accumulated a total loss of $41.3 billion since 2002. Investors call it 'aspiration.' Accountants call it a tab.

markets.context: Markets rose Friday on SpaceX's historic $75B IPO debut and optimism over a potential US-Iran peace deal that sent oil prices to an eight-week low.

gas.note: Down from a Memorial Day peak of $4.56 — still $1.11 more than this time last year, because nothing says summer road trip like a second mortgage.

popCulture.hed: Olivia Rodrigo's third album 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' dropped Friday and broke Spotify's 2026 single-day streaming record for a female artist
popCulture.dek: Released June 12 via Geffen Records, the 13-track album is already being called her most emotionally complex work yet — which is saying something for a woman who turned a driving permit into a No. 1 hit. Her 86-date Unraveled World Tour kicks off in September.

genZ.definition: A viral TikTok and social media meme format where someone narrates a situation slowly going wrong, and a blaring saxophone sax solo suddenly kicks in at full volume as chaos unfolds — borrowed from the Boyz n the Hood score. It has completely taken over feeds in June 2026 as the go-to format for escalating dread.
genZ.usage: Trump: 'The Iran deal will be signed today.' Iran: 'We did not agree to that.' Israel: *strikes Beirut* [SAXOPHONE GETS LOUDER]

tldr: Trump declared an Iran peace deal would be signed today, but Israeli strikes on Beirut and mixed signals from Tehran kept diplomats sweating; meanwhile SpaceX went public in the largest IPO in history, made Musk a trillionaire, and the UFC is literally fighting on the White House lawn tonight. Happy Flag Day.
